ddls:
CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer who placed the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date when the order was placed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the order (e.g., pending, completed, cancelled) */,
  "shipping_address_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the shipping address */,
  "billing_address_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the billing address */,
  "payment_gateway_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the payment gateway used */,
  "total_discount" REAL /* Total discount applied to the order */,
  "total_tax" REAL /* Total tax applied to the order */,
  "shipping_cost" REAL /* Cost of shipping the order */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency used for the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the order item */,
  "variant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the variant of the product ordered */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the order this item belongs to */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the item ordered */,
  "price" REAL /* Selling price of the item at the time of order */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the item was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the item was last updated */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the price is denominated */,
  "cost_price" REAL /* Cost price of the item */,
  "tax_category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the tax category applicable to this item */,
  "adjustment_total" REAL /* Total adjustment applied to the item price */,
  "additional_tax_total" REAL /* Total additional tax applied to the item */,
  "promo_total" REAL /* Promotional discount applied to the item */,
  "included_tax_total" REAL /* Total tax included in the item price */,
  "pre_tax_amount" REAL /* Amount before tax applicable to the item */,
  "taxable_adjustment_total" REAL /* Total taxable adjustments applied to the item */,
  "non_taxable_adjustment_total" REAL /* Total non-taxable adjustments applied to the item */,
  "discount_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the discount applied */,
  "return_status" TEXT /* Status of the item if returned (e.g., pending, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_variant_id FOREIGN KEY ("variant_id") REFERENCES variants ("variant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_tax_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("tax_category_id") REFERENCES tax_categories ("tax_category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_discount_id FOREIGN KEY ("discount_id") REFERENCES promotions ("promo_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the customer */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the primary address */,
  "customer_since" TEXT /* Date when the customer registered */,
  "loyalty_points" INTEGER /* Loyalty points accumulated by the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "variants" (
  "variant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product variant */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product this variant belongs to */,
  "variant_name" TEXT /* Name of the variant (e.g., color, size) */,
  "sku" TEXT /* Stock Keeping Unit for the variant */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the variant for shipping calculations */,
  "dimensions" TEXT /* Dimensions of the variant for shipping calculations */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("variant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_variants_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the product */,
  "base_price" REAL /* Base price of the product before any variants or discounts */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product category */,
  "manufacturer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the manufacturer */,
  "average_rating" REAL /* Average customer rating for the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tax_categories" (
  "tax_category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tax category */,
  "tax_name" TEXT /* Name of the tax category (e.g., VAT, Sales Tax) */,
  "rate" REAL /* Tax rate for this category */,
  "jurisdiction_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the jurisdiction for the tax category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tax_category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "promotions" (
  "promo_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each promotion */,
  "promo_code" TEXT /* The promotion code for the discount */,
  "discount_amount" REAL /* The amount of discount provided by the promotion */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the promotion */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the promotion */,
  "eligibility_criteria" TEXT /* Criteria for eligibility for the promotion */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("promo_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "adjustments" (
  "adjustment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each adjustment */,
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the order item affected by the adjustment */,
  "adjustment_type" TEXT /* Type of adjustment (e.g., return, discount) */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the adjustment */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the adjustment (e.g., damage, customer request) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("adjustment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_adjustments_order_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_item_id") REFERENCES order_items ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for authentication */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, staff, customer) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
